description: Api2Pdf is a hosted document-conversion service that generates PDFs from HTML, URLs, Office files, and images, and also supports PDF merging and barcode generation. It runs as a cloud API backed by AWS Lambda.
summary: Api2Pdf exposes one authenticated REST API for PDF/document conversion and barcode generation, documented by an OpenAPI spec at https://api.apis.guru/v2/specs/api2pdf.com/1.0.0/openapi.json and using a user-issued API key via query parameter or Authorization header.
